projects.name: BurpeePacers
projects.description: A fitness pacing app designed to help users maintain a consistent tempo for burpees and workouts.

projects.name: ChainHabit
projects.description: A habit tracking app focused on building chains and streaks to form long-term routines.

features.title: Apple Watch & HealthKit Integration
features.description: Add watchOS app featuring WatchConnectivity timer sync, HealthKit Functional Strength Training recording, and direct rep control actions.

features.title: Age-Bracket Extension (60s, 70s, 80+)
features.description: Extend iOS AgeBracket beyond 50+ to support older athletes (60s, 70s, 80+) with joint-friendly, scalable strength finishers. Update Models.swift, FinisherDatabase.swift, and AccountSettingsView.swift, and update WORKOUT_SPECIFICATION.md §5 first.

features.title: Smart Scale & Health Data Integration
features.description: Integrate smart scale and weighing app data (via Apple HealthKit or direct Bluetooth BLE scale connection) to automatically sync and update user body weight and other health/body composition metrics.

features.title: Port UI and Navigation to Android
features.description: Port the Swift UI/UIKit design components to Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

features.title: Interactive Home Screen Widgets
features.description: Add iOS 17 home screen interactive widgets for quick-checking habits.
